title: Obligación / Tener que
description: Frases para expresar que alguien tiene que hacer algo.

items.speaker: Mia
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L11-06 - E1116 - Mia - You have everything you need.mp3

items.speaker: Mother
items.text: We need some vegetables for dinner.
items.translation: Necesitamos algunas verduras para la cena.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L29-01 - E1291 - Mother - We need some vegetables for dinner.mp3

items.speaker: Mother
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L31-01 - E1311 - Mother - We need apples and milk.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: How many apples do we need?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L31-02 - E1312 - Ethan - How many apples do we need.mp3

items.speaker: Mother
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L31-03 - E1313 - Mother - We need six apples.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: How much milk do we need?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L31-04 - E1314 - Ethan - How much milk do we need.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: You should go to the nurse.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L36-06 - E1366 - Noah - You should go to the nurse.mp3

items.speaker: Mother
items.text: We need to open an account.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L42-02 - E1422 - Mother - We need to open an account.mp3

items.speaker: Clerk
items.text: Yes, but your mother must sign.
items.translation: Sí, pero tu madre debe firmar.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L42-06 - E1426 - Clerk - Yes, but your mother must sign.mp3
